_comment: Phase 1 shadcn test — maps shadcn/Base UI Card composition to MODE's ContentSection.
_phase1_goal: Validate the ingestion contract with a className-based palette bridge (shadcn has no theme prop).
_phase2_note: Phase 2 would replace color-scale.json + theme.json with shadcn's CSS var system so MODE's palette modes flow through shadcn's rendering.
name: ShadcnContentSection

palette._comment: shadcn has no theme prop. Palette is expressed through className. The .dark class scopes shadcn's CSS vars (--card, --foreground, etc.) to the section element and all descendants.
